gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用语音留言串起生死与距离，笑泪交织的浪漫奇遇。
gems.whyWatchEn: A hilarious and heartfelt romantic comedy where voicemails meant for the dead find a living soulmate across the miles.
gems.audience: 喜欢非典型浪漫、轻喜剧和温情故事的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of unconventional romance, lighthearted comedy, and heartwarming stories.

gems.title: 奥德赛
gems.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
gems.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,
gems.whyWatch: 古典史诗的现代重构，冒险与人性深度兼具。
gems.whyWatchEn: A fresh, visually stunning take on the classic odyssey that balances epic action with profound human struggle.
gems.audience: 喜爱神话史诗、宏大冒险及深刻角色刻画的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of mythological epics, grand adventures, and deep character studies.
